summary: End-to-end testing for Daniyal Graphic Designer portfolio (Bahrain). 6/6 backend pytests pass and all frontend critical flows verified on the public preview URL. No console errors, no Emergent badge, no Pricing section, contact form persists to MongoDB and opens WhatsApp tab as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores datetimes as ISO strings then converts back on read — works fine, but consider inserting native datetime so MongoDB index/sort uses BSON dates (current text sort on ISO works due to lexicographic order, but is fragile if timezone format ever changes).
Contact endpoint has no rate limiting / honeypot — minor concern for spam in public preview.
/api/contact GET is public and exposes inquiry data (name, email, message). If this site is deployed publicly, this endpoint should require auth or be removed from the public router.
Hero TypingRoles uses setTimeout per character — fine, but rerenders on every char; acceptable for this scope.
Navbar logo click does window.location.reload() which is functionally correct but a heavy UX pattern; PRD explicitly requested this so leave as-is.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 TEST_ contact inquiry via POST /api/contact during automated tests (test_e2e_user@example.com, test_tester1@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and use BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Reuse them as regression. Frontend public URL: https://brand-identity-pro-6.preview.emergentagent.com. Key data-testids: hero-section, hero-cta-work, hero-cta-whatsapp, portfolio-section, portfolio-tab-{id} (id ∈ all|logo|branding|social|resume|menu|profile|docs|web), portfolio-category-{id}, service-{logo|brand|web|social|resume|linkedin|menu|profile}, testimonial-{prev|next|dot-0}, contact-form, contact-input-{name|email|service|message}, contact-submit, floating-whatsapp, scroll-top, logo-button. Note: the request mentioned tab id 'web' which exists; 'brand' service-id maps to 'Brand Identity' (intentional).
verifications_passed: POST /api/contact persists with UUID id + ISO created_at
GET /api/contact returns list sorted desc, no _id leak
Home page loads with NO console errors; preloader animates and disappears
Hero headline 'I Create Brands That Stand Out' + cycling typing roles + CTAs visible
Portfolio filter: logo tab shows only logo category; web tab shows only web; all tab shows all 8
Contact form submission: toast 'Message sent!' shown + new tab opens https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=97333740941&text=...
Footer text: '© 2026 Daniyal Graphic Designer · All Rights Reserved. · Kingdom of Bahrain'
Floating WhatsApp button visible with href https://wa.me/97333740941
No #emergent-badge element in DOM and no 'Made with Emergent' / 'emergent.sh' visible text
Navbar logo-button has reload handler (window.location.reload) — verified element + handler present
